name: Ionic Rare Earths Limited
analysis: IXR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 63% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3900, stop A$0.3267, target A$0.4400 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
